title: Blend 001199 with 001196 four-seed RealMLP
summary: Use the four-seed RealMLP average as a light stabilizing component for 001199.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Recreate the 001196 four-seed RealMLP core prediction. Set final predictions to 0.85 * pred_001199 + 0.15 * pred_001196. Do not introduce stacking or calibration.
expected_effect: Inject pure neural variance reduction without adding more CatBoost bias.
risk: The four-seed component may be costly and may not add public signal.
